name: King's Distant Cousin

sheet.name: King's Distant Cousin
sheet.background_story: King's Distant Cousin is scholarly and has spent most of his life learning about the ancient spells within the Forsaken Lands.  However, he has been very bothered by the loss of King Offling. He has decided to join the upcoming Tournament in hopes that someone there may know how to find King in the Void. Worst case, he dies and directly looks for King in the afterlife.
